[[File:Journey to oz.webp|thumb|362x362px|Outfit examples from current Seasonal Event [[Journey to Oz]]]]
'''Clothing''' items are items that can be used to dress a [[birb]]. Users can collect clothing items during a [[Seasonal Events|seasonal event]], or purchase items using rainbow stones in [[Mr. Prickles' Shop]].

There are 10 categories of clothing items, not including [[Guardians|Guardian]] exclusive sparkle effects.

As of June 2026, there has been 44 seasonal events. There are 16 additional clothing [[Collections]] that were released before the implementation of seasonal events.  

== Changing Clothes ==
To change a clothing item, select Bag from the tabs at the bottom of the screen. Then select Clothing. Clothing items that you own are grouped by category. Tapping a clothing item will equip it.

== List of Clothing Items==
Items marked with * are also in the [[Everyday Collection]].

Items marked with ** are only available to purchase in [[Mr. Prickles' Shop]] seasonally. October and December collections are seasonal collections and only available during their respective months and two weeks leading up to them.

==='''Sparkle Effects'''===
[[Guardians]] have access to different sparkle effects. When selected, color sparkles will show around the user's birb. The user can access sparkle effects in the outfits section in a birb's bag; they are not available to buy in the shop. Users sponsored by a Guardian have access to the blue sparkle effect. If a sparkle effect is saved with an outfit, it will still be part of the outfit even if the user is no longer a Guardian or a user is no longer sponsored.
